use_cases.title: Guest checks estimate before placing order
use_cases.trigger: User wants a delivery quote for a new order
happy_path: Client sends estimate request to POST /guest/estimate
Request validation runs (e.g., appointment time, waypoints, coupon rules)
Pricing service calculates estimate based on request parameters
Response with price breakdown is returned to client
edge_cases: Invalid appointment time (too soon for order type)
Attempt to use a coupon (not allowed for guest)
Attempt to use a coupon on an A2B order (not allowed)
Missing required fields (e.g., vehicle type, waypoints)
use_cases.business_value: Allows guest users to compare prices and make informed decisions before committing to an order, improving conversion.

use_cases.title: Authenticated user checks estimate before placing order
use_cases.trigger: User wants a delivery quote for a new order
happy_path: Client sends estimate request to POST /estimate with Authorization token
User ID is extracted from token
Request validation runs (e.g., appointment time, waypoints, coupon rules)
Pricing service calculates estimate based on request parameters and user context
Response with price breakdown is returned to client
edge_cases: Invalid appointment time (too soon for order type)
Attempt to use a coupon on an A2B order (not allowed)
Missing required fields (e.g., vehicle type, waypoints)
use_cases.business_value: Provides logged-in users with price transparency, potentially with personalized pricing or coupon application, enhancing user experience and trust.

use_cases.title: Guest checks driver-specific price
use_cases.actor: Guest user (or system acting on behalf of guest)
use_cases.trigger: User wants to check the price for a specific driver
happy_path: Client sends request to POST /guest/check-price-driver
Request validation runs
Driver information is retrieved using DriverId
Pricing service calculates estimate based on request parameters and driver information
Response with driver-specific price breakdown is returned to client
edge_cases: Internal service error during driver lookup or price calculation
use_cases.business_value: Enables specialized pricing scenarios, such as direct driver assignments or fleet-specific pricing, supporting diverse business models.

use_cases.title: Guest checks home-moving estimate
use_cases.trigger: User wants a price estimate for a home-moving service
preconditions: Waypoints and home-moving specific details (e.g., goods, services) are provided
happy_path: Client sends request to POST /guest/home-moving/estimate
Request validation runs (details UNKNOWN as handler not provided)
Home moving pricing service calculates estimate
Response with price breakdown is returned to client
edge_cases: Invalid input for home-moving details (UNKNOWN as handler not provided)
use_cases.business_value: Provides specialized pricing for complex home-moving orders, catering to a distinct market segment.

use_cases.title: Guest checks price for an existing order
use_cases.trigger: User wants to re-calculate or confirm the price for an already created order
happy_path: Client sends request to POST /guest/orders/calc-price/:orderId
orderId is extracted and validated
Service retrieves order details and calculates price based on current order state
Response with price breakdown is returned to client
edge_cases: Internal service error during order lookup or price calculation
use_cases.business_value: Allows for dynamic price checks on existing orders, potentially after modifications or for reconciliation, improving transparency.

orderType.description: Type of order (e.g., Quick, Delivery, HomeMoving)

appointmentAt.description: Desired appointment time, defaults to now + buffer

vehiclePoolId.description: ID of the vehicle pool, defaults to DefaultVehiclePoolId

driverId.description: Driver ID (not used in guest estimate, but part of struct)

basePrice.description: Total estimated price in local currency

business_rules: Guest flow uses userId=0.
Default values are applied for appointment time (now + buffer), vehicle pool, and payment if not provided.
Appointment time is validated based on order type (Quick: 15min, Delivery/CA: 30min minimum from now).
Waypoints must have two entries if isA2B is true.
Waypoint addresses are validated against special characters.
Coupons are not allowed for guest users (userId=0).
Coupons are not allowed for A2B orders.

error_cases.condition: Invalid appointmentAt (e.g., too soon)
Invalid number of waypoints for A2B order
Missing branchId or organizationId for admin requests
Invalid characters in waypoint address
Coupon not allowed for guest user
Coupon not allowed for A2B order
Internal service error during estimation

orderType.description: Type of order (e.g., Quick, Delivery, HomeMoving)

appointmentAt.description: Desired appointment time, defaults to now + buffer

vehiclePoolId.description: ID of the vehicle pool, defaults to DefaultVehiclePoolId

driverId.description: Driver ID (not used in general estimate, but part of struct)

basePrice.description: Total estimated price in local currency

business_rules: User ID is extracted from the authentication token.
Default values are applied for appointment time (now + buffer), vehicle pool, and payment if not provided.
Appointment time is validated based on order type (Quick: 15min, Delivery/CA: 30min minimum from now).
Waypoints must have two entries if isA2B is true.
Waypoint addresses are validated against special characters.
Coupons are allowed for authenticated users, but not for A2B orders.

error_cases.condition: Failed to get userId from token
Invalid appointmentAt (e.g., too soon)
Invalid number of waypoints for A2B order
Missing branchId or organizationId for admin requests
Invalid characters in waypoint address
Coupon not allowed for A2B order
Internal service error during estimation

driverId.description: ID of the driver for whom to check price

order.description: Estimated order details including price breakdown

business_rules: A valid DriverId is mandatory.
Driver information is fetched from the Driver Service to inform pricing.
Price calculation is specific to the provided driver.

error_cases.condition: Invalid or non-existent DriverId (DRIVER_INVALID)
Internal service error during driver lookup or price calculation

external_dependencies.name: DriverClient.GetDriverById
external_dependencies.purpose: Validate driver and retrieve driver details

orderId.description: ID of the existing order (from path parameter)

userId.description: Set to 0 for guest flow, used in internal service call

basePrice.description: Total calculated price for the order

breakdown.description: Detailed breakdown of fees for the order

business_rules: Calculates the price for an already existing order.
Order ID is extracted from the URL path.
For guest flow, userId is 0 when passed to internal service.

error_cases.condition: Invalid orderId (e.g., not a number)
Order does not exist or is invalid
Internal service error during price calculation

external_dependencies.name: UserClient.GetUsers
external_dependencies.purpose: Attempt to retrieve user info (for guest, userId will be 0)

goods.description: List of goods for home moving (specific to home moving)

vehicleTypeId.description: Type of vehicle for home moving

basePrice.description: Total estimated price for home moving

business_rules: Specific pricing logic for home moving orders.
UNKNOWN (handler implementation not provided for detailed rules).

error_cases.condition: UNKNOWN (handler implementation not provided)

cross_cutting_observations: Guest and authenticated estimate flows (`/guest/estimate`, `/estimate`) share the same core internal `Estimate()` method, with the primary difference being the source of the `userId` (0 for guest, token for authenticated).
The `driverId` parameter in `/guest/check-price-driver` is crucial for driver-specific pricing, potentially overriding or complementing `vehicleTypeId` logic.
Coupon usage is strictly controlled: not allowed for guest users and explicitly disallowed for A2B (fixed amount) orders.
Appointment time validation is dynamic, adjusting minimum lead time based on the `orderType` (e.g., Quick, Delivery).
Waypoint addresses undergo validation to prevent special characters, ensuring data integrity.

The home-moving estimate (`/guest/home-moving/estimate`) uses a distinct endpoint, implying specialized pricing logic and potentially different request parameters, although the handler implementation is not provided.
The `/guest/orders/calc-price/:orderId` endpoint is designed for re-calculating prices for *existing* orders, contrasting with the pre-order estimation flows.

logic_evidence.why_it_matters: Entry point for guest users to get a price estimate.
Entry point for authenticated users to get a price estimate.
Core internal method for price estimation, called by both guest and authenticated flows.
Centralized validation logic for various order parameters, including appointment time, waypoints, and admin-specific fields.
Specific validation for waypoint addresses to prevent invalid characters.
Specific validation for coupon usage, restricting it for guest users and A2B orders.
Entry point for checking prices specific to a given driver, involving external driver service lookup.
Entry point for guest users to calculate the price of an existing order.
Core internal method for calculating the price of an existing order, called by guest flow.
Route definition for home-moving price estimation, indicating a distinct business flow.
